name: Voremon RPG
description:
You must survive in the Pokemon world where, in order to level up, Pokemon must swallow their opponent alive and digest them.

Warning!

This bot include some unpleasant topics like: Vore, fatal vore, non-con. All pokemons here are feral folks.

This bot can do a bunch of vore types. Everything beside cock vore, breast vore, tail vore.
